text.title: Web Scraping Resilience Procedure
text.summary: Five-step procedure from "we need to harden this scraper" to "config artefact in repo + wrappers in code". Decision-gates block on missing layers.

step.name: probe-rate-limit
step.action: Run 30 requests at progressive rates (1, 2, 5, 10 RPS). Note the rate at which 429s start. Halve that to derive target delay_ms range.
step.decision-gate: If 429 fires at <1 RPS — STOP; source is rate-limited beyond this methodology, escalate to human.

step.name: wire-jitter
step.action: Insert `await sleep(rand(delay_ms_min, delay_ms_max))` per request to the same domain. Per-domain limiter; cap concurrency at 3.
step.decision-gate: If delay_min == delay_max — STOP, fixed-interval is r1 violation.

step.name: wire-retry
step.action: Wrap each request: try → on transient error (timeout, 5xx, ECONNRESET) → backoff = base * 2^attempt + rand(0,1000) → retry up to 5 times → re-throw.

step.name: wrap-safe-extract
step.action: Replace `page.$eval(sel, fn)` with `safeExtract(() => page.$eval(sel, fn), defaultValue, timeout=5000)`. Return default on timeout or missing selector. Log to side-stream.
step.decision-gate: If any raw $eval remains — STOP, r3 not complete.

step.name: arm-crash-recover
step.action: Wrap the page loop in a try that catches "Target closed", "Session closed", "Browser has been disconnected" — relaunch the browser, requeue the failing URL. Enable anti-detect: navigator.webdriver=undefined; UA randomisation; stealth lib.
step.output: crash-recover + anti-detect wired; resilience-config artefact committed.
step.decision-gate: If both anti_detect_enabled and crash_recover_enabled are false — STOP, the scrape will not last the night.
